economic_notes: Bear Essentials Gas Bar operated on reserve. Investments in Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership (17.9%) and K'en T'em Limited Partnership (12.5%) for commercial economic development. Non-redeemable term deposits held as investments.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED because financial information for one GBE (Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership for year ended Dec 31, 2021) was not available and could not be audited. Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership (17.9%) and K'en T'em Limited Partnership (12.5%). No schedule of remuneration included in financial statements. Forestry and Resource Management segment shows $169,323 in expenses but no dedicated line in main statement expense summary; it is included under segment disclosure. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $1,381,003 + FNHA $64,000 + CMHC $34,361 + FTISS $271,886 + FNESC $208,935 + NNTC $12,847 + Hell's Gate Reserve Claim $17,660 + Other government per segment $510,317 net; used segmented other government total of $1,371,006 plus ISC $1,381,003 = $2,752,009. osr derived as total revenue minus total government transfers.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
